calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Jake H. Davis, individually and dba J&F Trucking.
Default was entered against defendant on July 6, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 6, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 12, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jake H. Davis, individually and dba J&F Trucking as follows:

Damages/Principal - $18,657.76.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,770.57.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $371.49, for a total judgment in the amount of $24,299.82.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Continued To Oct-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
